commands.purpose: Understand current cra flag parsing, the established safe-default pattern shipped for cld in sibling bead CL-w3q3, and the existing mock-capture-binary regression test structure to follow for cra.
commands.observed: bin/cra unconditionally set use_yolo=true and had no explicit --yolo opt-in flag; only --no-yolo existed to opt out. bin/cld's --skip-perms opt-in pattern (default safe, explicit opt-in prints a yellow stderr WARNING before forwarding the dangerous flag) was confirmed as the exemplar. tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py's mock-binary-on-PATH + captured argv/stderr pattern was confirmed as the test exemplar.

commands.purpose: TDD red gate for the new cra yolo-default regression tests, before touching bin/cra.
commands.observed: Expected failure before production change: 2 failed. test_cra_defaults_to_no_yolo_without_explicit_opt_in failed because default argv still contained --yolo; test_cra_yolo_explicit_opt_in_forwards_flag_and_warns failed because --yolo could not be distinguished as an opt-in (it was forwarded twice: once from agent_args passthrough, once from the unconditional default).

commands.command: git add tests/test_cra_launcher_defaults.py && git commit -m "test(CL-v1tb): red — cra safe yolo-default regressions"
commands.purpose: Commit the red test changes alone.

commands.command: uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_cra_launcher_defaults.py tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py -v
commands.purpose: TDD green gate after updating bin/cra; first pass after the production edit exposed a test-assertion bug of my own (expected argv without --yolo prepended), which was corrected in the test file.
commands.observed: First run: 11 passed, 1 failed (test bug: assertion incorrectly expected --yolo to be absent from the opt-in argv). After fixing the test assertion to expect ["--yolo", "Plain passthrough prompt"]: 12 passed (2 cra tests + 10 cld regression tests).

commands.command: git add bin/cra tests/test_cra_launcher_defaults.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-v1tb): green — cra yolo default requires explicit opt-in"
commands.purpose: Commit the production launcher fix together with the corrected test assertion.
Capture the final implementation commit order.
commands.observed: Top commits were c56c4a7 feat(CL-v1tb): green — cra yolo default requires explicit opt-in and b2ccc95 test(CL-v1tb): red — cra safe yolo-default regressions.

commands.command: Fix pass (Codex adversarial + Opus advisory): edit bin/cra to remove the ⚠ emoji from the --yolo stderr warning (no-emoji standard REGRESSION) and update the stale 'with automatic approvals' self-description in the header comment (line 2) and the --help heredoc to 'Cursor Agent launcher (approvals on by default; --yolo to auto-approve)'.
commands.purpose: Resolve the Phase 7 Codex REGRESSION (emoji in source) and the Phase 5 Opus advisory (stale self-description) without touching bin/cld, bin/cdx, AGENTS.md, or any out-of-scope file.
commands.observed: bin/cra warning now begins with plain-ASCII 'WARNING:' and retains the yellow ANSI color wrapper; header comment and --help both read 'Cursor Agent launcher (approvals on by default; --yolo to auto-approve)'. grep for ⚠ in bin/cra returned no matches.

commands.purpose: Syntax-check bin/cra after the fix-pass edits.

commands.command: uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_cra_launcher_defaults.py tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py -v
commands.purpose: Confirm the emoji removal and self-description edits did not regress the scoped suite; verify test_cra_yolo_explicit_opt_in_forwards_flag_and_warns still finds 'warning' and '--yolo' in stderr with plain-ASCII text.
commands.observed: 12 passed in 5.14s (2 cra tests + 10 cld regression tests); no tests weakened or skipped.

skipped_checks.reason: The bead explicitly required running only tests/test_cra_launcher_defaults.py and tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py.

skipped_checks.check: bd close / bd update --append-notes for CL-v1tb
skipped_checks.reason: This environment does not have bd-write access for this bead per the bead's Project Architecture Context note; implementation and commit only, no bd mutation attempted.
